text: Hi — my order #EP-220 still shows as preparing. Any update?
Thanks — confirmed!
Can I exchange my recent purchase?
Of course! Reply with the order number and we'll get that going.
Order #WC-414 — any tracking yet?
cinnamon rolls proofed early, can you drop Dorothy's metformin refill on the way in?
[to Beth] Blue Plate pot roast tonight, Amy's coming after the study group
your blood pressure check is Thursday, do not skip it again
[to Beth] Tyler's on shift Saturday so it's just us and Mom for supper
the master bath quote from Henderson came in at 12,000, we'll talk tonight
[to Beth] grabbed calcium and your ibuprofen at Walgreens, ease up on those
church potluck Sunday, I'm bringing apple turnovers, you bring the brisket
[to Beth] anniversary is the 21st, do not let the shop eat that day
off shift Saturday, I'll come help pull the Mustang's transmission
[to Tyler] Sarah's folks want to do dinner, thinking the 15th around my birthday
you still need a hand loading the alignment rack when it lands?
[to Tyler] caught a five pound catfish at Elephant Butte, sending a pic
Cowboys looked rough Sunday, defense can't tackle
[to Tyler] Border Patrol has me on nights all next week, text not call
shop books are reconciled through Friday, QuickBooks looks clean
[to Amy] senior design project is eating my week, still doing Saturday bookkeeping
graduation is December 12, mark it before the car show takes over
[to Amy] you should move the emergency fund to Ally, 1.5 percent is leaving money on the table
meal prepped again, yes I know, you can stop teasing me
[to Amy] the SBA loan amortization looks fine, 7.2 is about market for the microloan
Sunday service at First Baptist then BBQ in the backyard, everybody in
[to FamilyGroup] Dorothy's eye screening with Dr. Foster is next week, Karen's covering the morning
Thanksgiving at the house November 26, Beth's got the bird
[to FamilyGroup] Mustang's getting paint before the December show, come see it
Little League Thunderbolts play Saturday at Riverside Park, come cheer
[to FamilyGroup] Mom's glucose has been steady this week, good numbers all around
that 2018 Silverado is a wheel bearing, I can hear it from the bay
[to Eddie] transmission on the Tahoe is a valve body, rebuild kit's ordered
brisket comp entry is in for next month, we're doing the ghost pepper rub
[to Eddie] customer's coming at 2 for the estimate, I'll have it written up
Cowboys watch party at my place Sunday if you can't host
[to Linda] sent the SMS confirmations for tomorrow's tickets, six cars in
the Reynolds upholstery invoice came by email, forwarded to Amy
[to Linda] parts run to NAPA is done, brake pads are back on the shelf
moved the alignment walkthrough with Southwest to Friday afternoon
